_comment: Aggregated eval config for Arena's eval_runner.py (multi-job success-rate + HTML report). The GR00T server (real checkpoint or dataset replay) must already be serving on remote_port. For a single-job rehearsal, prefer run_eval.sh (policy_runner). policy_config_dict keys map to Go2AirbotEefClosedloopPolicyCfg fields; arena_env_args keys map to the env CLI (external_environment_class_path selects our IK-EEF eval env). num_envs=1 is required for the ReplayPolicy server.
